case_title: JESSE CUEVAS VS. WAVE BROADBAND LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JESSE CUEVAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAVE BROADBAND LLC IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT REVIEWS FILED DOCUMENTS RE: REJECTION OF AUTHORIZED AGEND FOR SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXPLAINS THAT HE HAS BEEN IN CONTACT OVER THE PHONE WITH REPRESENTATIVES FROM WAVE BROADBAND AND THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THIS MATTER MAY MOVE FORWARD WITH A HEARING. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE:NO APPEARANCES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CORPORATION SERVICE COMPANY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUEVAS, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT WAVE BROADBAND LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUEVAS, JESSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAVE BROADBAND LLC $571.81 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $616.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WAVE BROADBAND LLC HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO APR-06-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. JUDGMENT IS OVERTURNED. PLAINTIFF IS TO AMEND CLAIM TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANT AND SERVE. PLAINTIFF JESSIE CUEVAS IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WAVE BROADBAND LLC REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE CUTLER, VP CUSTOMER CARE VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE/COURTCALL. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
